creatures.name: Meadow Rabbit
creatures.description: A fluffy rabbit that loves clover. Skittish but easy to befriend.

creatures.name: Field Sparrow
creatures.description: Hops more than it flies. Sings at dawn to wake the sanctuary.

creatures.name: Spotted Fawn
creatures.description: A young deer with star-shaped spots. Calms every creature nearby.

creatures.name: Honey Badger
creatures.description: Fearless and sticky-pawed. Always smells faintly of wildflower honey.

creatures.name: Clover Stag
creatures.description: Antlers grow real four-leaf clovers said to bring good fortune.

creatures.name: Golden Hare
creatures.description: Said to outrun sunrise itself. Leaves a trail of glittering dew.

creatures.name: Forest Squirrel
creatures.description: Hoards shiny pebbles instead of nuts. Very particular about its pile.

creatures.name: Mossy Toad
creatures.description: Camouflaged so well it is sometimes mistaken for a rock.

creatures.name: Silver Fox
creatures.description: Moonlight seems to follow its fur. Curious but cautious of strangers.

creatures.name: Luminous Moth
creatures.description: Wings glow faintly blue at dusk, guiding lost travelers home.

creatures.name: Shadow Lynx
creatures.description: Moves between the trees without a sound. Hard to spot, harder to catch.

creatures.name: Elder Owl
creatures.description: Said to remember every secret the forest has ever kept.

creatures.name: Pebble Goat
creatures.description: Climbs sheer cliffs without a second thought. Headbutts out of habit.

creatures.name: Frost Hare
creatures.description: Fur turns pure white in the cold, perfectly matching the snowdrifts.

creatures.name: Crystal Turtle
creatures.description: Its shell grows real crystal facets that chime softly when it walks.

creatures.name: Snow Fox
creatures.description: Padded paws let it cross ice fields silently and without slipping.

creatures.name: Geode Golem
creatures.description: Formed from compressed mountain crystal. Slow, gentle, and unbreakable.

creatures.name: Aurora Wolf
creatures.description: Its howl is said to paint the northern sky in shifting color.

creatures.name: Dune Beetle
creatures.description: A glossy shelled beetle that rolls sand into perfect little spheres.

creatures.name: Desert Lizard
creatures.description: Changes color with the dunes at sunset. Loves sunbathing on warm rocks.

creatures.name: Sun Falcon
creatures.description: Dives faster than the eye can follow, chasing the midday glare.

creatures.name: Cactus Camel
creatures.description: Small flowering cacti grow along its back, blooming once a season.

creatures.name: Mirage Jackal
creatures.description: Appears to shimmer and split into copies under the desert heat.

creatures.name: Desert Spirit
creatures.description: A swirling guardian of sand and wind that only shows itself at dusk.

creatures.name: Cloud Sprite
creatures.description: Made of condensed cloud-stuff. Giggles when poked, then drifts away.

creatures.name: Sky Mouse
creatures.description: Tiny paper-thin wings let it glide between the floating islands.

creatures.name: Wind Serpent
creatures.description: Coils through the air currents, never quite touching solid ground.

creatures.name: Star Rabbit
creatures.description: Fur speckled like a night sky. Most active under a full moon.

creatures.name: Thunder Drake
creatures.description: A small drake that crackles with static before every short flight.

creatures.name: Celestial Stag
creatures.description: Antlers map the constellations. Walks paths no one else can see.

creatures.name: Phoenix
creatures.description: Wreathed in gentle flame that warms but never burns. The sanctuary's pride.

creatures.name: Moonlight Unicorn
creatures.description: Appears only on clear nights. Its horn glows softly like captured moonlight.
